meaning: n.(动、植物的)宏(观)进化,种外进化,大进化
examples: Macroevolution studies how taxonomic groups above the level ofspecies change.
Sedimentary basin forming dynamics system is the macroevolution and correlation of the sedimentary basin, the mantle, the asthenosphere, the lithosphere, and Moho discontinuity.
For Darwin, macroevolution is just microevolution aggregated over long periods of time and space.
